title: sphaerocionium urbani
intro: Sphaerocionium urbani, also known as the city button fern, is a small, epiphytic fern native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Sphaerocionium urbani lie in its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic, making it useful in treating wounds and skin infections. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Sphaerocionium urbani can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, with the recommended preparations varying depending on the specific health condition being treated.
